invite-added.body:
Hi,

{inviterName} added you to the {workspaceName} workspace on Contentrain Studio.

Open workspace
invite-added.name: Workspace Invite — Added
invite-added.subject: You've been added to {workspaceName} on Contentrain Studio

invite-reminder.body:
Hi,

This is a reminder that you have a pending invitation to the {workspaceName} workspace on Contentrain Studio.

Open workspace
invite-reminder.name: Workspace Invite — Reminder
invite-reminder.subject: Reminder: You've been invited to {workspaceName} on Contentrain Studio

payment-failed.body:
Hi,

We couldn't charge your payment method for the {planName} subscription on {workspaceName}.

You have until {gracePeriodEndsText} to update your payment details. If the charge doesn't go through by then, the workspace will be downgraded to the free plan.

Update payment method

If you think this is a mistake, check with your card issuer or reply to this email.
payment-failed.name: Payment — Failed
payment-failed.subject: Action required: payment failed for {workspaceName}

payment-recovered.body:
Hi,

Good news — we've successfully charged your payment method for {workspaceName}. Your {planName} subscription is active again.

No action needed. Thanks for sticking with Contentrain Studio.

View billing
payment-recovered.name: Payment — Recovered
payment-recovered.subject: Payment received — {workspaceName} is active again

subscription-activated.body:
Hi,

Your {planName} subscription for {workspaceName} is now active at {planPrice}/month.

You'll be billed monthly until you cancel. You can manage your subscription anytime:

Manage billing

Questions? Just reply to this email.
subscription-activated.name: Subscription — Activated
subscription-activated.subject: Your {planName} plan is active on Contentrain Studio

subscription-canceled.body:
Hi,

Your {planName} subscription for {workspaceName} has been canceled. The workspace is now on the free plan.

Changed your mind? You can resubscribe anytime and pick up where you left off.

Reactivate

If this was unexpected, reply to this email and we'll sort it out.
subscription-canceled.name: Subscription — Canceled
subscription-canceled.subject: Your Contentrain Studio subscription has been canceled

trial-ending.body:
Hi,

Your Contentrain Studio trial for {workspaceName} ends {trialEndsText}.

Once the trial ends, your {planName} subscription starts automatically at {planPrice}/month — no action required if that's what you want.

If you'd like to change your plan or cancel before it renews, manage your subscription below:

Manage billing

Questions? Reply to this email.
trial-ending.name: Trial Ending Reminder
trial-ending.subject: Your Contentrain Studio trial ends {trialEndsText}

webhook-dlq-alert.body:
Hi {recipientName},

A webhook in your {workspaceName} workspace has permanently failed after 5 delivery attempts.

Webhook{webhookName}
URL{webhookUrl}
Event{eventType}

Please check the endpoint is reachable and responding with a 2xx status code.

Review webhook settings
webhook-dlq-alert.name: Webhook Delivery Failed
webhook-dlq-alert.subject: Webhook delivery failed: {webhookName} — {workspaceName}
